segments.text: Hear this word, you cows of Bashan on Mount Samaria, you women who oppress the poor and crush the needy, who say to your husbands,
Bring us more to drink.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: The Lord GOD has sworn by His holiness:

Behold, the days are comingwhen you will be taken away with hooks,
and your posterity with fishhooks.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text:
You will go out through broken walls, each one straight ahead of her,
and you will be cast out toward Harmon,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: declares the LORD.
Go to Bethel and transgress; rebel even more at Gilgal! Bring your sacrifices every morning, your tithes every three days.
segments.speaker: Amos

segments.text:
Offer leavened bread as a thank offering, and loudly proclaim your freewill offerings.
For that is what you children of Israel love to do,
segments.speaker: The Lord GOD

segments.text: declares the Lord GOD.

I beset all your cities with cleanness of teeth and all your towns with lack of bread,
yet you did not return to Me,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: declares the LORD.
I also withheld the rain from youwhen the harvest was three months away. I sent rain on one citybut withheld it from another. One field received rain; another without rain withered.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: People staggered from city to cityfor water to drink, but they were not satisfied; yet you did not return to Me,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: declares the LORD.
I struck you with blight and mildewin your growing gardens and vineyards; the locust devoured your fig and olive trees, yet you did not return to Me,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: declares the LORD.

I sent plagues among youlike those of Egypt; I killed your young men with the sword, along with your captured horses. I filled your nostrils with the stench of your camp, yet you did not return to Me,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: declares the LORD.
Some of you I overthrewas I overthrew Sodom and Gomorrah, and you were like a firebrand snatched from a blaze, yet you did not return to Me,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: declares the LORD.
Therefore, that is what I will doto you, O Israel, and since I will do this to you, prepare to meet your God, O Israel!
segments.speaker: Amos

segments.text:
For behold, He who forms the mountains, who creates the wind
and reveals His thoughts to man, who turns the dawn to darkness and strides on the heights of the earth—
the LORD, the God of Hosts, is His name.
segments.speaker: The LORD
